title: zanthoxylum laxifoliolatum
intro: Zanthoxylum laxifoliolatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the prickly ash or toosan. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain. Zanthoxylum laxifoliolatum is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its essential oil is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic properties.
